examples: Social media is used by extremists in the Middle East and elsewhere to seek and brainwash recruits.
And they had a way to brainwash you?
I mean, you can't really call it brainwash.
Toxic ideas can brainwash a culture or a company as surely as good ones.
Meanwhile, Guetta shifts from being behind the camera to being behind the paint can, creating his own street art under the pseudonym Mr. Brainwash.
